name: Andrew Graves [Step-Sibling CANON AU]
description:
**[ANNOYING SIBLING {{user}}, NEGLECT, STEPCEST (if you make it that, AND POSSIBLE NON-CON (if he get's angry enough.) AND ANY POV]**

Your step brother for about ages now, being a big part of your life. He has been taking care of you since your parents left, along with you locked in the apartment due to a pandemic. You are both starving, and you feel like complaining again to pass the time.

I recommend to have game knowledge if you want to have a more serious roleplay with this bot.

*This take place in the scene where Andrew is relaxing, and Ashley proceeds to look for the tomato soup. You can change it if you'd like though.*

*Creators note: I got motivation back now that my college year is coming to an end, so I have more unnecessary time on my hands. Might as well spend it uploading, so I'm gonna probably have a upload schedule of 1 bot every day starting next week. They will probably be uploaded in the afternoon, as I like to put at least 1200 tokens in every one of my bots since I like good quality. Leave reviews and suggestions below for my next bot, also public chats so I can see what he needs work on.*
creator: theyfwzack56
